'''gajala''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oarage|oarage]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-j-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oarage|oarage]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| gajala
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæjælæth|gæjælæth]] || [[word:gæjælæj|gæjælæj]] || [[word:gæjælæsh|gæjælæsh]] || [[word:gæjælæ|gæjælæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gajajalath|gajajalath]] || [[word:gajajalaj|gajajalaj]] || [[word:gajajalash|gajajalash]] || [[word:gajajala|gajajala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gajalath|gajalath]] || [[word:gajalaj|gajalaj]] || [[word:gajalash|gajalash]] || [[word:gajala|gajala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gajaflath|gajaflath]] || [[word:gajaflaj|gajaflaj]] || [[word:gajaflash|gajaflash]] || [[word:gajaflaf|gajaflaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gajalatha|gajalatha]] || [[word:gajalaja|gajalaja]] || [[word:gajalasha|gajalasha]] || [[word:gajalaka|gajalaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gajalath|gajalath]] || [[word:gajalaj|gajalaj]] || [[word:gajalash|gajalash]] || [[word:gajala|gajala]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gajalathal|gajalathal]] || [[word:gajalajal|gajalajal]] || [[word:gajalashal|gajalashal]] || [[word:gajalakal|gajalakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gajalathatha|gajalathatha]] || [[word:gajalajaja|gajalajaja]] || [[word:gajalashasha|gajalashasha]] || [[word:gajalaka|gajalaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gajalathan|gajalathan]] || [[word:gajalajan|gajalajan]] || [[word:gajalashan|gajalashan]] || [[word:gajalakan|gajalakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gajalathaoro|gajalathaoro]] || [[word:gajalajaoro|gajalajaoro]] || [[word:gajalashaoro|gajalashaoro]] || [[word:gajalakaoro|gajalakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
